title: Network Dimensionality and Boundary Conditions
description: A visual explanation of how the number of neurons and layers in a neural network creates a more complex, high-dimensional decision boundary capable of separating non-linearly separable data.
relationships: Input data is projected into a higher-dimensional space via hidden layer transformations
A complex, non-linear decision boundary is formed in the high-dimensional space
This high-dimensional boundary is projected back to the original input space as a complex, non-linear separator
